meta_title: For Students: freelance pitching to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Freelance Pitching to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the no-portfolio trap. Learn to pitch freelance AI projects using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your career as a student engineer.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth—you don't need a past; you need a prototype. By using Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can launch a high-impact freelance MVP in 48 hours. Pitch the value, not the history, and secure your first client immediately.
content.intro:
The screen glows, casting a sharp blue light on your face. You have the skills, the curiosity, and the drive, but you face the ultimate student paradox: you need a portfolio to get a project, but you need a project to build a portfolio. This cycle is a silent career killer that keeps talented builders shackled to tutorials while the industry moves at breakneck speed.

But the rules of the game have shifted. The era of the 'resume' is fading, replaced by the era of the 'demonstrable result.' You don't need a decade of experience to command respect; you need a single, polished, functional AI application that solves a real business headache. We are going to bypass the gatekeepers by leveraging professional-grade AI engineering tools to turn your first freelance pitch into a masterclass in value delivery.

steps.title: Identify a Micro-SaaS Problem
steps.description: Don't build a generic app. Scan local business websites or niche forums for repetitive manual tasks. Your goal is to find a $500 problem you can solve in a weekend.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following business niche for high-frequency, manual data entry tasks that could be automated via an AI agent: [Insert Niche]. Provide a feature list for a lean MVP.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Research common pain points for small [Niche] businesses and suggest 3 high-impact AI automation ideas.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate. Focus on a clean, scalable stack that demonstrates you understand production-grade patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js 14 project structure with Supabase integration and an AI API route for handling document analysis.

steps.title: Build the Core Value Loop
steps.description: Focus only on the 'Happy Path.' If the user uploads a file, the AI must process it flawlessly. Ignore edge cases for the first prototype.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, modular service layer in TypeScript that connects an LLM to the user's uploaded data, returning a structured JSON response.
steps.claude_code_command: claude modify src/services/ai-processor.ts --task 'Implement robust error handling and structured output parsing'

steps.title: Polish the User Experience
steps.description: Perception is reality. Use Tailwind CSS to make your prototype look like a high-end enterprise tool. Design matters as much as code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-conversion landing page component for this AI tool using Tailwind CSS, focusing on a professional, minimalist aesthetic.

steps.title: Execute the Cold Pitch
steps.description: Stop applying for jobs. Reach out to business owners with a video of the app working. Frame it as a 'Beta test' to lower the barrier to entry.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a 100-word cold outreach email that highlights the specific problem I solved, shows the prototype, and asks for a 10-minute feedback call.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Draft a professional, non-salesy email to a potential client showcasing the MVP built in this project.'

pro_tips: Never lead with 'I'm a student.' Lead with 'I built a tool that saves you 5 hours a week.'
Record a 60-second Loom video of your code running. It is more powerful than a GitHub link.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you go; clean documentation proves you are a professional, not a hobbyist.
Offer a 'Pilot Period' where the client gets the tool for free in exchange for a public testimonial.
Focus on the 'Time-to-Value' metric. If your app saves them money in under 5 minutes of usage, you've won the contract.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project, package the code into a reusable template, publish it to a live domain, and start reaching out to 5 prospects per day until your first contract is signed.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a professional. You have the tools, the workflow, and the strategy to build a career-defining project this weekend. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
